notes: Tags: iteration-loop, deliberate-action, shipping-discipline. The 'iteration-loop' tag captures the partial-application property of karma-yoga (residual benefit from interrupted practice). The 'deliberate-action' tag captures the structural-form requirement (the practice must be karma-yoga, not generic effort). The 'shipping-discipline' tag is consistent with the karma-yoga block. Tags are mutually compatible and non-redundant. Cross-references to Shankara's contrast structure (vs agriculture / vs medical) and Sridhara's three-way contrast (vs farming / vs ritual) are doctrinally accurate. The engineering layer's chaos-drill / fruit-attached-feature contrast is the operational analog of the commentarial contrasts. No conflict with neighboring 2.38 (equanimity-doctrine seed; the disposition behind action-without-grasping) or 2.47 (mature niṣkāma-karma); 2.40 fits cleanly between them as the verse on the discipline's safety properties.
